rationale: The proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b). Elec. Code §63.011 governs provisional voting procedures. The two provisions address entirely unrelated subject matters with no overlap.
quote: Sec. 63.011. PROVISIONAL VOTING. (a) A person to whom Section 63.001(g) or 63.009 applies may cast a provisional ballot if the person executes an affidavit stating that the person:
_note: No conflict exists; the rule_text concerns election procedures and the proposed change concerns property tax exemptions.
